app.name: Genuivo
app.tagline: AI assistant with rich, interactive answers

home.title: Genuivo
home.description: Ask anything and get maps, lists, links, and structured answers you can act on — not just plain text. Genuivo is an AI assistant that responds with rich, interactive UI.
home.feature1Desc: Get maps, lists, cards, and links instead of walls of text. Every answer is built for the content it presents.
home.feature2Desc: When your question needs more context, Genuivo asks with input fields — then delivers a complete answer in one step.
home.feature3Desc: For real-time data like events, listings, and prices, Genuivo searches the web and structures the results for you.

docs.title: Documentation
docs.description: Learn how Genuivo uses AI to answer your questions with rich, interactive UI

seo.overview: What is Genuivo? An AI assistant that responds with rich, interactive UI — maps, lists, cards, and structured answers instead of plain text.
seo.howItWorks: How Genuivo works. The AI builds visual UI trees — titles, lists, maps, and input controls — rendered natively in the app.
seo.chat: Chat with Genuivo's AI. Ask questions and get visual answers with maps, lists, and structured layouts — not walls of text.
seo.layouts: Genuivo layout types: paragraphs, lists, grids, maps, links, cards, and input controls for rich AI-generated interfaces.
seo.maps: Interactive maps in Genuivo. Ask about restaurants, stores, or locations and see them plotted with pins and details.
seo.clarification: How Genuivo asks for clarification. The AI gathers missing details upfront — no back-and-forth — then delivers the final answer.
seo.webSearch: Genuivo's web search. Real-time data from multiple sources, extracted and presented in structured layouts.

content.overviewBody: Genuivo is an AI-powered assistant that responds to your questions with rich, interactive UI — not just plain text. Ask about restaurants, open houses, travel, or anything else, and get maps, lists, links, and structured answers you can act on.
content.howItWorksBody: When you ask a question, Genuivo sends your request to an AI that understands how to build visual interfaces. Instead of returning a wall of text, it returns a structured UI tree — a combination of titles, lists, maps, cards, and input controls that the app renders natively. If it needs more information from you, it asks with input fields. If it needs live data, it searches the web automatically.
content.chatBody: The Chat page is your main interaction point. Type your question, and the AI responds with a visual answer. If the AI needs more details (like your city or preferences), it will show input fields for you to fill in. Once it has enough information, it delivers a complete answer with the best layout for the content — a map for places, a list for comparisons, a paragraph for explanations.
content.layoutsBody:
Genuivo supports a rich set of layouts to present information:

• Paragraph — text blocks for explanations and summaries
• List — vertical lists for step-by-step info or ranked items
• Grid — two-column grids for visual comparisons
• Map — interactive maps with pins for places and addresses
• Links — clickable links to external websites
• Cards — titled cards with images, subtitles, and details
• Inputs — text fields, dropdowns, date pickers, and toggles for gathering your preferences
content.mapsBody: When you ask about physical locations — restaurants, stores, open houses, parks — Genuivo displays them on an interactive map with pins. Each pin shows the place name and address. Below the map, a companion list provides additional details. All coordinates and addresses come from verified data or live web search results.
content.clarificationBody: If your question is missing key details, the AI will ask before guessing. For example, asking "find me a restaurant" will prompt for your city, cuisine preference, and budget. The AI asks all questions at once — no back-and-forth. After you submit your answers, it delivers the final result immediately.
content.webSearchBody: For questions that need current, real-time information — like open house listings, today's events, or live prices — Genuivo automatically searches the web. It gathers results from multiple sources, extracts the relevant facts, and presents them in a structured layout. You get real data, not guesses.
